entity.summary: Solana concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange protocol with residual liquidity and historical spot-trading activity but very low recent volume.
entity.notes: Current first-party Cropper Finance domain remains reachable. DefiLlama classifies Cropper CLMM as a Solana concentrated-liquidity DEX and reports residual current TVL, negligible 30-day volume, zero 7-day and 24-hour volume, and substantial historical cumulative volume. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active status.

evidence.title: Cropper Finance official website
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party Cropper Finance domain remains reachable at review time.

evidence.title: Cropper CLMM metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies Cropper as a Solana CLMM and reports residual TVL, negligible 30-day DEX volume, zero recent 7-day and 24-hour volume, and substantial cumulative DEX volume, supporting limited classification.

evidence.title: Cropper CLMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Cropper CLMM as a Solana decentralized exchange.
